title: Total Functions, Result Values, and Pattern Matching · Lazy Trace Forensics
summary: Make a batch import explain every rejected record rather than aborting or returning ambiguous sentinels. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a typed parse-validate-result pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define outputs for every admitted input or narrow the domain with an explicit validation boundary.
Represent success and failure as explicit immutable variants with useful evidence.
Use structural pattern matching with guarded, ordered, and intentionally exhaustive cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
